backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no methods or state, serving as a placeholder backend for the static frontend application.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: All India Services messaging, Specialty Items section, and static asset rendering for specialty item images.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the enhanced App component with All India Services badge, SpecialtyItems component, custom hooks, and Tailwind configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining coffee and cardboard color palette for the moving company website.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component featuring header with logo, hero section with All India Services badge, services grid, SpecialtyItems component, contact information, and footer with social links.
frontend/src/components/SpecialtyItems.t: React component displaying a three-column grid showcasing specialty moving services for photo frames, trophies, and antiques with hover effects and scroll animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook managing ICP backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, query caching, and automatic invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty file with export statement, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static content website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook using IntersectionObserver to detect element visibility in viewport and trigger scroll-based animations with configurable threshold.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with a coffee and cardboard color scheme for both light and dark modes, including custom CSS variables for colors, typography settings using Inter font, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (coffee, cardboard, sidebar), border radius variables, box shadows, animations, and typography settings, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for Malhotra Packers and Movers website, listing implemented features including homepage with company info, contact details, 24/7 availability, coffee/cardboard color scheme, and modern layout with animations.
